evals.prompt: Write a Python function that finds the longest palindromic substring. Then run it through an eval-driven improvement loop — write a test script that scores correctness and performance, iterate until all tests pass and the solution is efficient.
evals.expected_output: A well-optimized longest palindromic substring implementation with passing tests and a clear iteration log showing score improvements.

evals.prompt: Generate a simple infographic poster about climate change using HTML/CSS. Run an eval-driven loop — create a rubric that scores clarity, visual appeal, and data accuracy, iterate until the score is above 85%.
evals.expected_output: A polished HTML infographic with iteration log showing score progression toward 85%.

evals.prompt: Write a product description for a new coffee subscription service. Use an eval-driven improvement loop — create an LLM-as-a-judge rubric for engagement and accuracy, iterate until both scores are above 90%.
evals.expected_output: A compelling product description with an iteration log showing improvements toward 90% on both dimensions.
